---
title: "Projects"
---

## Project library

Projects combine several ideas from the lessons.

::: {.lesson-grid}

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 1: Quiz Game
[Open Mini Project 1](mini_project_1_quiz_game.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 2: Guess the Number
[Open Mini Project 2](mini_project_2_guess_the_number.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 3: Dice Game
[Open Mini Project 3](mini_project_3_dice_game.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 4: Flashcard Trainer
[Open Mini Project 4](mini_project_4_flashcard_trainer.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 5: Score Tracker
[Open Mini Project 5](mini_project_5_score_tracker.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Mini Project 6: Personal Notebook
[Open Mini Project 6](mini_project_6_personal_notebook.qmd)
:::

::: {.lesson-card}
### Final Project
[Open Final Project](final_project_beginner_program.qmd)
:::

:::
